metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: Raw passthrough of routed command stdout/stderr — console.print() wraps at 80 cols when piped, corrupting JSON and machine output
Raw passthrough of routed command stdout — console.print() wraps at 80 cols when piped, corrupting JSON and machine output
Formatter handler — purpose is to format and print Rich output. console.print() is the core function, not a violation.
Formatter handler — purpose is to format and print Rich output. console.print() is the core function, not a violation.
handle_command returns dict (not bool) — module doubles as drone adapter for route_module_command() which requires dict return with stdout/stderr/exit_code
Discovery handler needs registry_handler.load_registry() to resolve branch paths for help lookups. Justified cross-handler dependency — discovery is the only consumer.
Scanner needs discovery_handler's get_entry_point() and parse_help_for_commands() to discover commands from branch help output. Justified — scanner's core function depends on discovery's parsing.
_ExternalModuleConfig is PascalCase — leading underscore is Python private convention, not a naming violation
module_registry_handler routes through generic_adapter.capture_main() — this IS the routing mechanism. Cross-handler import is the core design.
Plugin lives in apps/plugins/ by design — separate from 3-layer structure. Plugins are an intentional extension point.
Lazy import of trigger.fire() — event notification after PR creation. Non-blocking, wrapped in try/except.
Plugin lives in apps/plugins/ by design — separate from 3-layer structure.
Plugin imports lock_handler.find_repo_root() — drone-internal plugin, same branch.
Plugin lives in apps/plugins/ by design — separate from 3-layer structure.
Plugin imports lock_handler.find_repo_root() — drone-internal plugin, same branch.
Plugin lives in apps/plugins/ by design — separate from 3-layer structure.
Plugin imports lock_handler.find_repo_root() — drone-internal plugin, same branch.
Plugin lives in apps/plugins/ — deliberately outside 3-layer structure (same pattern as devpulse_ops).
Plugin filename convention: {plugin_name}_plugin.py inside {plugin_name}/ directory.
Simple toggle plugin — creates/removes a flag file. No state changes that warrant trigger events.
Test file — intentionally outside 3-layer structure. tests/ is a peer of apps/, not part of it.
Test mock side_effect closures are necessarily nested inside test methods. Refactoring to top-level breaks test locality.
Test methods and mock helpers in this file are pre-existing without docstrings. Class docstrings describe intent; per-method docs would be noise.
Test file — intentionally outside 3-layer structure. tests/ is a peer of apps/, not part of it.
Test file imports lock_handler directly to test its public interface. Unit tests require direct access to implementation components.
Test file — intentionally outside 3-layer structure. tests/ is a peer of apps/, not part of it.
Test file imports handlers directly to test their public interface. Unit tests require direct access to implementation components.
Test class docstrings describe intent; per-method docstrings would be noise for assertion-named test methods.
Test file — intentionally outside 3-layer structure. tests/ is a peer of apps/, not part of it.

Test file imports rm_handler directly to test its public interface. Unit tests require direct access to implementation components.
Test class docstrings describe intent; per-method docstrings would be noise for assertion-named test methods.
Test file — META blocks are for production source files, not test suites.
Test file exercises .unlink() to verify deletion behavior — not a production file operation requiring trigger events.
Test file — intentionally outside 3-layer structure. tests/ is a peer of apps/, not part of it.
Test file imports broker handlers directly to test their public interface. Unit tests require direct access to implementation components.
Test file exercises .unlink() to clean up test symlinks — not a production file operation requiring trigger events.
Acceptance test artifact — standalone demo script, not part of 3-layer production structure.
Acceptance test imports handlers directly to verify broker daemon behavior end-to-end.
Acceptance test script — main() is self-documenting via module docstring and inline comments.
Acceptance test script uses sys.path.insert to locate the package from the artifacts/ directory.
Docstring run instruction shows how to invoke the script — not a production help text.
Acceptance test artifact — META blocks are for production source files.
Acceptance test exercises .unlink() to clean up test symlinks — not production file operations.
stat.S_IMODE() guarded by os.name != 'posix' skip at runtime. POSIX-only secret permission test.
Standalone acceptance demo runner — helper functions invoked from the demo main, not a production module (same pattern as the other demo bypasses).
Template builder expects CLAUDE.md — drone uses .aipass/aipass_local_prompt.md for branch context instead. Not a missing file.
Public CRUD API surface (update_command, command_exists) — tested, available for programmatic use. No CLI subcommand wired yet.
create_pr() is deprecated per FPLAN-0210 — pr command blocked at auth tier. Handler kept for backwards compatibility; still tested in test_git_module.py.

get_introspective() called dynamically via getattr() by module_registry_handler.py:219 for internal module introspection. Also tested in test_git_module, test_system_pr, test_devpulse_plugins, test_git_access.
Threaded broker entrypoint, exercised by tests/test_broker.py; production uses blocking start(); intentionally not called in shipped non-test code.

notes.usage: Add entries to 'bypass' list to exclude specific violations

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
fields.lines: Optional - specific line numbers to bypass

notes.removed_s61: 13 naming bypasses removed (9 __all__ + 4 local variable false positives). Seedgo dispatched to fix naming_check.py. If audit fails on naming after this, the checker fix didn't land.
